lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: Welcome to my food store! Would you like to buy anything?

lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: We have this really exotic fruit all the way from Karamja. It's called a banana.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I think I'll try one.

lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: Great. You might as well take a look at the rest of my wares as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't like the sound of that.

lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: Well, it's your choice, but I do recommend them.

sections.title: After he hires the player during Pirate's Treasure

lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: Is it nice and tidy round the back now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, can I work out front now?

lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: No, I'm the one who works here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, are you going to pay me yet?

lines.speaker: Wydin
lines.text: Ah well, it'll give you something to do, won't it.
